channel.title: Personal Blog
channel.description: A personal blog about web development, technology, and more

item.title: Welcome to My Blog
item.description: This is my first blog post where I introduce myself and talk about what you can expect from this blog.

item.title: Mastering React Hooks - A Deep Dive
item.description: Learn advanced React hooks patterns and best practices for building robust applications.

item.title: Building Scalable APIs with Node.js
item.description: Best practices for designing and implementing scalable REST APIs that can handle growth.
item.author: your-email@example.com (John Doe)
